2. `crates/orbit-engine/src/activity_job/tool_enforcement.rs` - line 83 uses `LoopAuditEvent::ToolCallRequested { tool_name, .. }` - but this is a pattern match (destructuring) not a construction.

342	    // the same session_id across iterations.

content.text:
The two non-`agent_loop.rs` hits are both pattern matches (`match` arm and `filter_map` closure), not constructions. Only one file synthesizes these values.

## Construct sites

- `crates/orbit-agent/src/loop_engine/agent_loop.rs`: constructs both variants via `sink.emit(...)` — `ToolCallRequested` at line 304 (before `dispatch`, capturing input blob SHA256) and `ToolCallResult` at line 317 (after `dispatch`, capturing outcome/output SHA256/duration).
